name: Maine Dietitian License
description: Already licensed as a dietitian? Here's whether your license transfers to Maine - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

provider.name: Board of Licensing of Dietetic Practice
provider.parentOrganization: Maine Office of Professional and Occupational Regulation (OPOR)

address.description:
Department of Professional and Financial Regulation
Office of Professional and Occupational Regulation
35 State House Station
Augusta, Maine 04333-0035

requiredDocuments.name: CDR Registration Card
requiredDocuments.description: Proof of active registration with the Commission on Dietetic Registration.

requiredDocuments.name: Criminal History Records Check
requiredDocuments.description: Processed internally by the Board upon receipt of the $21 fee with an application.

requiredDocuments.name: Official College Transcripts
requiredDocuments.description: May be required if not submitting primary source verification via the CDR.

fingerprinting.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

mainEntity.name: How much does a Maine dietitian license cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: The initial cost is $171, which includes a $150 license fee and a $21 criminal history records check fee.

mainEntity.name: When does the Maine license need to be renewed?

acceptedAnswer.text: Maine dietitian licenses expire annually on December 31st. The renewal fee is $150. A $50 late fee is added if renewed after the expiration date.

mainEntity.name: What are the continuing education requirements for Maine?

acceptedAnswer.text: Licensees must complete 15 hours of approved continuing education annually. At least 4 of these hours must be from approved Category 1 programs.

mainEntity.name: Does Maine have reciprocity for dietitians?

acceptedAnswer.text: No interstate compact currently covers dietitian practice in Maine. To work in Maine, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to transfer my dietitian license to Maine?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most endorsement applications take 3 to 5 Weeks.

mainEntity.name: Can I start working in Maine while my endorsement application is processing?

acceptedAnswer.text: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.
